title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Lucknow

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Lucknow
jsonLd.description:
IIM Lucknow, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Lucknow:
IIM Lucknow is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Lucknow!
